hook_styles.label: Benefit List
hook_styles.guidance: Lead with a concrete payoff or upgrade and imply a useful list or set of options.
hook_styles.example: 7 Bathroom Ideas That Feel More Expensive

hook_styles.label: Problem Solution
hook_styles.guidance: Name a decorating friction point and hint at the practical fix in one fast hook.
hook_styles.example: Small Bathroom? Try This Scandinavian Trick

hook_styles.label: Designer Tip
hook_styles.guidance: Use a confident editorial tip or insider move that feels helpful rather than salesy.
hook_styles.example: The Designer Move That Makes Wood Furniture Feel Lighter

hook_styles.label: Transformation
hook_styles.guidance: Focus on the before-to-after feeling or upgraded outcome without sounding exaggerated.
hook_styles.example: This One Swap Makes a Neutral Bedroom Feel Finished

hook_styles.label: Small Space
hook_styles.guidance: Frame the hook around limited space, layout efficiency, or making a compact room work better.
hook_styles.example: Tiny Bathroom? Start With These Slim Storage Pieces

hook_styles.label: Seasonal
hook_styles.guidance: Use only when the article genuinely benefits from a timely seasonal angle or refresh signal.
hook_styles.example: Spring Bedroom Refresh Ideas That Still Feel Calm
